templates.title: CSV Reader — baca CSV ke list of dict
templates.description: Baca file CSV dengan header baris pertama, kembalikan list dictionary. Pakai csv bawaan Python.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(filepath, encoding="utf-8"):
    """Baca file CSV dan kembalikan list of dict."""
    rows = []
    with open(filepath, "r", encoding=encoding, newline="") as f:
        reader = csv.DictReader(f, delimiter='{{delimiter}}')
        for row in reader:
            rows.append(dict(row))
    return rows

templates.title: CSV Writer — tulis list of dict ke CSV
templates.description: Tulis data list of dict ke file CSV dengan header otomatis dari key dict pertama.
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(filepath, rows, encoding="utf-8"):
    """Tulis list of dict ke file CSV."""
    if not rows:
        return
    fieldnames = list(rows[0].keys())
    with open(filepath, "w", encoding=encoding, newline="") as f:
        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames, delimiter='{{delimiter}}')
        writer.writeheader()
        writer.writerows(rows)
